From: Eng manager
To: BI

We want to drop the column stg_events.raw_payload_v1 (superseded by v2 six months ago).
What breaks if we do? Evidence attached:

ddl.sql: CREATE TABLE stg_events (event_id INT, raw_payload_v1 TEXT, raw_payload_v2 TEXT,
loaded_at TIMESTAMP); CREATE VIEW vw_events AS SELECT event_id, raw_payload_v2, loaded_at
FROM stg_events;
estate-map.md (drawn 06-09, derived from ddl + full repo grep + owner confirmations):
stg_events → vw_events (only consumer, evidenced); repo-wide grep for raw_payload_v1
(06-09, S. Lee): zero references outside the DDL; loader job writes v1 as NULL since
2025-12 (owner-confirmed, S. Lee 06-09). Coverage: no islands, no unverified edges on
this slice.
